headlines.description: Jake O'Brien headed a last-gasp equaliser as Everton stretched their unbeaten Premier League run to nine games with a 1-1 draw against West Ham United.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton take unbeaten run to nine under Moyes

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest continued their push for an unlikely top-four finish with a comfortable 4-2 win at Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest boost top-four hopes with 4-2 win over Ipswich

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Manchester City

headlines.description: Manchester City could only muster a 2-2 draw with Brighton on Saturday, dropping points in a blow to their hopes of playing in Europe next season.
headlines.shortLinkText: City's European hopes suffer as struggles continue

headlines.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers beat bottom side Southampton 2-1 at St Mary's Stadium on Saturday as the visitors took a giant step towards Premier League survival.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves boost survival hopes with 2-1 win at Southampton
